title: create: Fix key=value annotation in the flag output

comments.body: LGTM, but please add `[CI:DOCS]` to your PR title and re-push to fix CI.

Thanks @Foxboron 
Please sign your commits and add
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
Also remove [CI:DOCS] since this is actually a change to code.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Foxboron*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
